title: GOOD: Rc::clone out of RefCell before await prevents runtime borrow panic
description: In api.rs, send_message and set_nickname clone the Rc<NieRelayClient> out of the RefCell<Option<Rc<...>>> before entering the async block, dropping the borrow immediately. The async block then captures the Rc directly, not the RefCell borrow. If instead the borrow were held across the await point, any other synchronous JS call that also borrows the same RefCell would trigger a runtime panic (already borrowed: BorrowError) because the WASM event loop is single-threaded but re-entrant — a JS callback can fire between yield points. The struct comment explicitly names this as the motivation, and the pattern is applied consistently across all async methods.
